description: Add DCA, trailing stop, dynamic position sizing, and multi-strategy features to the trading bot

userStories.title: Add DCA config parameters to trend_bot service
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to configure DCA behavior so I can customize dollar cost averaging settings
acceptanceCriteria: Add DCA config: dcaEnabled (bool), dcaMaxPositions (number, default 3), dcaAddPercent (number, default -2), dcaAddAmount (number, default 5), dcaCooldownMinutes (number, default 30), dcaReduceOnTP (bool)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add DCA state tracking variables
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the bot to track DCA state so I can see current averaging positions
acceptanceCriteria: Add DCA state: dcaPositionCount (number), dcaAvgEntryPrice (number), lastAddPositionTime (timestamp)
Initialize state on new position open
Reset state on position close
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: State tracking via updateDCAState/resetDCAState - initialized on open, reset on close

userStories.title: Implement DCA core logic
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the bot to automatically add to positions at configured price drops so I can lower my average entry price
acceptanceCriteria: When price drops dcaAddPercent from avg entry and position count < dcaMaxPositions and cooldown passed, execute DCA buy
Update dcaPositionCount and dcaAvgEntryPrice after each DCA buy
Reset lastAddPositionTime after each DCA buy
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add trailing stop config parameters
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to configure trailing stop behavior so I can protect profits while letting them run
acceptanceCriteria: Add trailing stop config: initialTP (number, default 3), trailingPercent (number, default 1), minTrailingTP (number, default 2), maxTrailingTP (number, default 5)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added initialTP, trailingPercent, minTrailingTP, maxTrailingTP to Config interface and CONFIG

userStories.title: Add trailing stop state tracking
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the bot to track trailing stop state so I can monitor profit protection status
acceptanceCriteria: Add trailing state: trailingActive (bool), highestPrice (number), trailingTP (number)
Initialize trailingActive to false when position opens
Reset all trailing state when position closes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added trailingActive, highestPrice, trailingTP vars + resetTrailingState() function

userStories.title: Implement trailing stop activation logic
userStories.description: As a trader, I want trailing stop to activate when profit reaches initialTP so I can start protecting gains
acceptanceCriteria: When profit percentage >= initialTP, set trailingActive to true and highestPrice to current price
Set initial trailingTP to current price minus trailingPercent
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Modified take profit check to activate trailing instead of immediate exit

userStories.title: Implement trailing stop trailing logic
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the bot to trail the highest price and trigger stop when price drops so I can lock in profits
acceptanceCriteria: While trailingActive, update highestPrice when current price exceeds it
Recalculate trailingTP as highestPrice minus trailingPercent
When (highestPrice - currentPrice) / highestPrice >= trailingPercent, trigger stop
Ensure trailingTP never exceeds maxTrailingTP
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added trailing logic: update highestPrice, recalc trailingTP, cap at maxTrailingTP, trigger stop on drop

userStories.title: Add dynamic position sizing config parameters
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to configure dynamic position sizing so I can adjust exposure based on signal strength
acceptanceCriteria: Add dynamic position config: basePercent (number, default 10), maxPercent (number, default 20), minPercent (number, default 5), signalStrong (number, default 5), signalWeak (number, default 2), strongMultiplier (number, default 1.5), weakMultiplier (number, default 0.5)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added basePercent, maxPercent, minPercent, signalStrong, signalWeak, strongMultiplier, weakMultiplier

userStories.title: Implement dynamic position size calculation
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the bot to calculate position size based on signal strength so I can size positions appropriately
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate position size: if signal >= signalStrong use basePercent * strongMultiplier, if signal <= signalWeak use basePercent * weakMultiplier, else use basePercent
Cap position at maxPercent and floor at minPercent
If balance < 1000 USDT, use minPercent
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: calculatePositionPercent() adjusts size by signal strength, capped/floored, low balance uses minPercent

userStories.title: Add multi-strategy mode configuration
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to switch between trading modes so I can adapt to different market conditions
acceptanceCriteria: Add strategy mode config: strategyMode (enum: 'trend', 'grid', 'arbitrage', 'smart')
Add smart switching thresholds: strongTrendThreshold (number), weakTrendThreshold (number)
Default mode is 'trend'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement smart strategy switching logic
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the bot to automatically switch strategies based on trend strength so I can profit in both trending and ranging markets
acceptanceCriteria: When strategyMode is 'smart': detect trend strength from signals
If trend strength >= strongTrendThreshold, use trend strategy
If trend strength <= weakTrendThreshold, use grid strategy
Otherwise continue with current strategy
Log strategy switches for debugging
Typecheck passes
